title: Candlestick Probability and Breakouts
subtitle: Historical Win Rate Tracking per Pattern — Next-Bar, Within-N, and Breakout Probabilities
author: Christian Benjamin (lynnchris)
verdict: HIGH EXTRACT — pattern win rate calculation framework directly applicable to scoring our departure candle patterns. Three probability metrics: next-bar, within-N, and breakout confirmation. Volume-weighted versions. LookAheadBars=5 for forward test.

probability_metrics.volume_weighted: weight each occurrence by its tick_volume for volume-weighted versions

breakout_definition.bullish: price moves > BreakoutPips (5) above pattern high within BreakoutConfirmBars (1) and closes above
breakout_definition.bearish: price moves > BreakoutPips (5) below pattern low within BreakoutConfirmBars (1) and closes below

keep: Three probability metrics (next-bar, within-N, breakout) — comprehensive pattern evaluation
Pattern win rate as training data for ML classifier (Part 34/35)
discard: Manual pattern catalog approach (use ta-lib from Part 32)
improve: Run pattern probability analysis per symbol at startup — cache results as part of MarketDNA (Part 40)
Use pattern win rates to weight departure_strength: if pin bar has 72% next-bar win rate on this instrument, departure_strength = 3; if only 55%, = 1
Calibrate LookAheadBars to match our TP1 distance in bars

creviaderiv_application.per_symbol_pattern_win_rates: Run over 2000 bars per symbol. Cache win rates. Use to weight departure_strength.
creviaderiv_application.example: If EURUSD bullish_engulfing has 65% within-5-bars win rate → departure_strength 3. If only 52% → 1.
